arts.ttl: Eberl on Palhinha's start to life at Bayern: "He needed time"
arts.sum: Max Eberl has explained why Bayern Munich need to be patient with Joao Palhinha and why he's expected to play such an important role in the future.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl underlines his desire to fine tune the club’s operation rather building it back up from the ground
arts.sum: Fresh off witnessing new head Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany mastermind a thrilling 6-1 victory over newly promoted Bundesliga side Holstein Kiel, Max Eberl sat down with Sport1 Doppelpass to speak about several topics. [What has made Bayern so great, a unity of quality and the capacities the club has, along with the decision makers at the club, we are trying to unite that.] Vincent Kompany will get the time for that - this is the statement from Bayern Munich, not from Max Eberl.”

arts.ttl: “Almost impossible mission” to play against Bayern Munich per Vincent Kompany
arts.sum: For Kompany, he referred back to his playing days in communicating how Bayern Munich’s opponents can sometimes feel. With the teams who have won it in recent years, there are a few who will obviously aim for the same, but it’s a special venue for the final and there is a special feeling here about the Champions League.”

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Dinamo Zagreb: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Bayern Munich begin their 2024/25 Champions League campaign on Tuesday evening, hosting Croatian side Dinamo Zagreb at the Allianz Arena. The fairly inexperienced coach has made the dream start in Bavaria, winning all of his competitive fixtures to date.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich chief admits to 'difficult' contract negotiations with Jamal Musiala, as Man United and Man City eye moves for the German star
arts.sum: Bayern Munich director Max Eberl has revealed agreeing a new contract with Manchester United and Manchester City target Jamal Musiala is proving 'difficult'.

arts.ttl: Eric Dier does have a future at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: When Bayern Munich signed Eric Dier on loan from Tottenham Hotspur in January, there was uncertainty surrounding whether the former England international would be of the standard to keep Der…

arts.ttl: Who will be the future captain of Bayern Munich?
arts.sum: When Manuel Neuer suffered a double leg break during a skiing accident after the 2022 World Cup in Qatar, there were concerns that the Bayern Munich captain may have to…

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich, Manchester City, Manchester United, FC Barcelona all vying for Xavi Simons; Bayer Leverkusen taking one more run at Jonathan Tah?; Arsenal-Real Madrid to swap stars?; Dani Olmo out 4-5 weeks; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich won 1-6 against Holstein Kiel; Cyler and Samrin break down the performance, wonder what Max Eberl is thinking when it comes to Leon Goretzka, discuss whether Uli Hoeness should still have a voice in sporting matters at Bayern and more: Bayern Munich is rumored to have its eyes on Paris Saint-Germain loanee Xavi Simons as a 2025 summer transfer window target.

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb ready for Champions League showdown with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Dinamo Zagreb knows it facing an uphill battle against Bayern Munich in the Champions League on Tuesday, but that does not mean that the squad is just going to roll over and take an “L.” When asked about potentially scoring against the Bavarians, the striker said some other things were more important: “Scoring against Bayern?

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Manuel Neuer looking forward to Champions League journey
arts.sum: Bayern Munich goalkeeper Manuel Neuer has been around the block a few times, so preparing for the Champions League is old hand to the veteran by this point. We’re looking forward to the start tomorrow,” Neuer said (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).
